sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content: In compliance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Organic Law 3/2018 of 5 December on the Protection of Personal Data and Guarantee of Digital Rights (LOPDGDD), we inform you about the processing of your personal data.

sections.heading: 1. Data controller
sections.content:
• Identity: Enjoy Club 78 S.L. (NIF: B75300376) — Av. Tucán, 1, 07400 Alcúdia, Illes Balears
  • Email: privacidad@grupoenjoy.es
  • Data Protection Officer (DPO): Not applicable per Art. 37 GDPR

sections.heading: 2. Data we collect
sections.content:
We collect personal data depending on the user's interaction with our services:

2.1. Data provided directly

ContextData collected
Reservation at Hiru (restaurant)Name, email, phone, date, time, number of guests, occasion, allergies, special requests
Reservation at Enjoy (lounge)Name, email, phone, date, time, number of guests, area type, occasion
Ticket purchase / VIP booking at OutxideName, email, phone, payment data (processed by external gateway), date of birth (age verification)
Group newsletterEmail, name (optional), preferred venue
Contact formName, email, subject, message

2.2. Data collected automatically

Only after explicit acceptance via the cookie banner may we collect browsing data through analytics and marketing cookies (see Cookie Policy):

  • IP address (anonymised in GA4)
  • Browser type and device
  • Pages visited and time spent
  • Traffic source and referral URL

sections.heading: 3. Purposes and legal bases for processing
sections.content:
PurposeLegal basisRetention period
Reservation management (Hiru / Enjoy)Performance of a contract (Art. 6.1.b GDPR)Duration of the reservation + 1 year
Ticket sales and VIP bookings (Outxide)Performance of a contract (Art. 6.1.b GDPR)Duration of the event + 5 years (tax obligation)
NewsletterExplicit consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR)Until consent is withdrawn
Web analytics (GA4)Explicit consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR)14 months (GA4 setting)
Marketing and remarketing (Meta Pixel, TikTok Pixel)Explicit consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR)Until consent is withdrawn
Handling enquiries / contactLegitimate interest (Art. 6.1.f GDPR)Resolution of the enquiry + 1 year
Compliance with legal obligationsLegal obligation (Art. 6.1.c GDPR)Applicable legal periods (tax: 5 years)

sections.heading: 4. Data recipients
sections.content:
Your personal data may be shared with the following recipients:

RecipientPurposeLocation
Vercel Inc.Web hosting and edge functionsUSA (Data Privacy Framework)
Google LLC (Google Analytics 4)Web analytics (consent only)USA (Data Privacy Framework)
Meta Platforms Inc. (Meta Pixel)Marketing and remarketing (consent only)USA (Data Privacy Framework)
TikTok (ByteDance)Marketing and remarketing (consent only)USA/Singapore (Standard Contractual Clauses)
Resend Inc.Transactional email deliveryUSA (Data Privacy Framework)
FourVenues S.L.Ticketing and reservation system (Outxide)Spain (EU)

All international data transfers are carried out under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework or through Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission, ensuring a level of protection equivalent to the GDPR.

sections.heading: 5. Data subject rights
sections.content:
In accordance with Articles 15 to 22 of the GDPR, you have the right to:

  • Access: know what personal data we process about you.
  • Rectification: request the correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
  • Erasure: request the deletion of your data when it is no longer necessary.
  • Objection: object to the processing of your data in certain circumstances.
  • Restriction: request restriction of processing in certain cases.
  • Portability: receive your data in a structured, commonly used format.
  • Withdrawal of consent: withdraw your consent at any time.

To exercise these rights, you may send a request to privacidad@grupoenjoy.es, stating your full name and stating the right you wish to exercise. We will only ask you to prove your identity if there are reasonable doubts about it. We will respond within one month, extendable by two further months where justified by the complexity or number of requests (Art. 12.3 GDPR).

If you believe your data is not being processed in accordance with the regulations, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD) — www.aepd.es.

sections.heading: 6. Security measures
sections.content:
We apply appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure a level of security appropriate to the risk, including:

  • TLS/SSL encryption on all Website communications.
  • Restricted access to personal data by authorised personnel only.
  • Regular backups and secure storage.
  • Ticket payments are processed entirely on the external FourVenues platform (web.fourvenues.com), under its own terms and privacy policy.
  • IP anonymisation in analytics tools.

sections.heading: 7. Minors
sections.content: Our services are not aimed at persons under 16 years of age. We do not intentionally collect data from persons under 16. Access to the Outxide Club microsite requires age verification (18 years) in compliance with nightlife venue regulations.

sections.heading: 8. Updates to this policy
sections.content: We reserve the right to amend this Privacy Policy to adapt to legislative changes or changes in our practices. Any material changes will be notified through the Website. We recommend reviewing this page periodically.
